title: Huawei OptiXstar EG8041X6-10, GPON ONT Gateway, WiFi 6
description: The Huawei OptiXstar EG8041X6-10 is a GPON ONT Gateway with support for Wi-Fi 6 (802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/ax) and a maximum transmission speed of 2402 Mb/s on 5 GHz and 574 Mb/s on 2.4 GHz. The ONT unit is equipped with four LAN ports with speeds of 10/100/1000 Mb/s This device is ideal for high-speed internet service providers as it enables extensive coverage, stable and fast data transmission, and efficient network management Device Power adapter (12V / 1A)
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Fixed Fixed antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 7, 5 Optics Transmission speed 2.488 / 1.244 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 / 1490 Transfer type GPON Polishing type APC Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 27 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (4) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Max. power consumption [W] 11,7 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1A Physical characteristics Buttons Reset, WPS, power, WiFi Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 237 Width [mm] 155 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 105
